title: Mnesis CanonicalFrame
description: One frame of embodied spatial-action data = one JSONL line. Open standard, Apache-2.0. Authority: SPEC.md / Parthenon 03 §3.2. Keep in lock-step with schema.py.

index.description: Global monotonic frame index across episodes.

frame_index.description: Frame index within episode (0-based, strictly increasing — cross-frame rule enforced by validate_frames).

t_hw_ns.description: Hardware ns (ARCore frame.timestamp) — join key pose<->video.

observation.state.description: 7-DoF state (ego_v1) or variable-length float[N] (robot_v2, N per registry joint_names).

observation.images.ego.description: File reference to the ego video frame ('' allowed). Required for ego_v1 profile.

action.description: Relative delta [tx,ty,tz, rx,ry,rz] (m, axis-angle rad) for ego_v1; variable-length for robot_v2.

source.device.description: Capture surface, e.g. phone, glasses, quest, pico, robot, sim (open set).

source.modality.description: Capture modality, e.g. ego_human, teleop, robot_replay, sim (open set).

profile.description: Frame profile (v0.2+). When absent, defaults to ego_v1 (backward-compatible).

embodiment_id.description: Reference to an embodiment registry entry (v0.2+). Optional.

observation.eef_pose.left.description: Left end-effector pose [tx,ty,tz, qx,qy,qz,qw] (robot_v2 profile, optional).

observation.eef_pose.right.description: Right end-effector pose [tx,ty,tz, qx,qy,qz,qw] (robot_v2 profile, optional).

action.gripper.description: Optional gripper channel (v0.4+, additive, all profiles). Normalized 0.0 (fully open) .. 1.0 (fully closed). Absent = source provides no gripper info (NOT 0.0). Physical stroke is described by the embodiment registry, not per-frame.
